tr.td: 1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
Metformin hydrochloride 500 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Alendronic acid (as alendronate sodium) 10 mg oral tablet
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (75 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms (1 spray) sublingually as needed for chest pain, may repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Hydrocortisone 10 mg/g and urea 100 mg/g cutaneous cream
Apply a thin layer (approximately 1 g) to the affected area twice daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Development of individualized plan of care
Assessment of health and social care needs
Depression screening using Patient Health Questionnaire Two-Item score (procedure)

ul.li: Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Reduce body weight by 5% to improve blood pressure control.
Limit daily sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams per day.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic physical activity per week.
Patient will demonstrate understanding and application of diabetes self-management skills, including medication adherence, blood glucose monitoring, diet, and physical activity.
Maintain or achieve HbA1c at individualized target level.
Maintain fasting blood glucose within individualized target range.
Maintain blood pressure within individualized target range.
Maintain LDL cholesterol below individualized target.

tr.td: Vaccine product containing only Influenza virus antigen (medicinal product)
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
